message:
fix(mermaid): add CJK measure_text tests + constraints field fixup

Re-add CJK display-width tests for measure_text (cjk_display_width,
cjk_wrapping, mixed_ascii_cjk). Add missing `constraints` field to
MermaidDiagramIr constructors in layout, render, and diagram_layout
test helpers after hook-introduced struct expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
